OSS public-read strategy: confirm bucket-level public-read POLICY (Architect recommendation) vs per-object signed URLs / per-object ACL=public-read. Bucket-level is simpler/cheaper but larger blast radius; signed URLs give revocation but complicate CSP and CDN caching. Choice affects OSS_PUBLIC_BASE_URL shape and frontend CSP img-src.

Mongo distributed lock vs in-process mutex for sync: the github draft LOCKED an in-process Promise mutex (single Docker instance assumption). If you plan >1 backend replica on ECS, the mutex must become a Mongo (or Redis) distributed lock; otherwise two replicas can run sync concurrently. Confirm single-instance is the v1 deploy.

MAX_FEATURED_WORKS cap and featured-cap race: cap is best-effort (read-count-then-update) and accepted in v1 given a single seeded admin. Confirm the default (8) and whether a stricter transactional cap is needed before multi-user.

Tombstone cross-collection atomicity: delete + githubsettings.$addToSet cannot be atomic without a transaction. Confirm the deploy uses the 1-node replica set (transactions available) so the delete + tombstone can be wrapped in a session transaction; else accept the documented best-effort crash window.

PAT re-entry vs re-encryption on migration: the live plaintext PAT in data/github-settings.json is NOT migrated verbatim (security). Confirm the operator will re-enter the PAT via POST /api/v1/github/settings after deploy (vs building a one-shot CLI that re-encrypts the legacy plaintext PAT).

PREVIEW_BUILD_FALLBACK_JSON env (frontend Q-8): the frontend draft referenced a checked-in snapshot for offline next builds when the backend is unreachable, but the env var name was a typo (FALLLOW). Confirm whether you want the fallback mechanism at all, or whether CI builds will always have the backend reachable.

Role model depth: v1 has a single seeded admin (role='admin'); all write endpoints use AdminRoleGuard (role==='admin'). Confirm no second role (e.g. editor) is needed before launch, since adding roles later is additive but affects every guard.

Compliance / Alibaba ICP filing: OSS bucket public-read + custom CDN domain on a mainland ECS host may require an ICP filing for the domain. Confirm the OSS_PUBLIC_BASE_URL host (cdn.jsdelivr.net for synced content is fine; OSS/CDN host for uploads may need ICP).
